medical_history.chief_complaint: Papulovesicular skin lesions on the upper chest and back.
medical_history.history_of_present_illness: The symptoms began after the first week of erlotinib therapy and gradually progressed to the face and scalp region over three months. The patient has a history of metastatic adenocarcinoma of the lung and previous first-line chemotherapy failure.
medical_history.past_medical_history: Metastatic adenocarcinoma of the lung; previous first-line chemotherapy failure.

physical_examination.general_examination: The patient appears comfortable with no signs of systemic distress. Vital signs are not specified.
physical_examination.specialty_examination: Physical examination revealed multiple pustular nodules on the scalp and papulovesicular skin lesions on the upper chest and back. The lesions are non-tender, with mild associated itching but no signs of infection.
